confirmed.title: Confirmed by Shopper
confirmed.description: True only after the shopper explicitly confirms starting this return/refund.

itemsToReturn.title: Items to Return
itemsToReturn.description: Comma-separated product names the shopper chose to return (match the items you showed them), or 'all' for the whole order. Capture this from the shopper before processing.

orderIdentifier.title: Order Identifier
orderIdentifier.description: Order number or Woo id to return. Leave blank for the most recent order.

reason.title: Return Reason
reason.description: Damaged, Wrong Item, Not As Described, Changed Mind, Quality, or Other.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass the loggedInEmail variable. Required to process the return.
